observations.text: The message claims the recipient's account will be suspended without immediate action.
observations.quote: verify your account immediately or it will be suspended

evidence.text: Urgency and suspension threat appear in the pasted text.

observations.text: The message asks the recipient to open a URL and enter a password and one-time code.
observations.quote: enter your password and one-time code

evidence.text: A URL string is present in the paste.

inferences.text: The combination of urgency, credential request, and an unverified link is consistent with phishing.

unknowns.text: The true sender and the destination of the linked URL were not verified because Phase 1 performs no external checks.

confidence.rationale: Assessment is based only on the pasted text; no live verification was performed.

recommended_next_steps.text: Do not click the link or enter passwords or one-time codes.
Contact your bank only through an official channel you already trust.
